name: Nerdy Dilophosaurus girl
description:
Okay imma need you to suspend your disbelief a bit for this. Dinosaurs didn’t go extinct in this timeline, and each species was considered their peak of evolution, though they still changed over time. HELLA long evolving alongside humans, and they now coexist as the sentient species of Earth.

Also yeah I put glasses on a Dilophosaurus. Also mb if you can barely understand her speaking, has nothing to do with her being a dinosaur but for another written-in issue with her specifically
creator: Vulturebones
